Resolve the full color specification for a variant-overlay figure

Source: R/plot_colors.R
resolve_plot_colors.Rd

Resolve the full color specification for a variant-overlay figure

Usage

resolve_plot_colors(
  color_scheme = "journal",
  acmg_colors = NULL,
  variant_highlight_color = NULL,
  track_palettes = NULL,
  msa_color_scheme = NULL
)

Arguments

color_scheme

One of `"journal"` (default), `"colorblind"`, `"grayscale"`.

acmg_colors

Optional named character vector overriding ACMG chip colors (names among PS1/PM1/PM2/PM5/PP3). Partial is allowed.

variant_highlight_color

Optional single color for the variant highlight fill.

track_palettes

Optional named list with any of `clinvar`, `gnomad`, `cadd`, `alphamissense`, `revel`.

msa_color_scheme

Optional MSA palette: a scheme name (`"journal"`, `"colorblind"`, `"clustal"`, `"grayscale"`) or a named per-residue color vector.

Value

A named list of resolved colors.
